competitors.name: Generic AI coding copilots
weaknesses: Not positioned as a control plane
competitors.positioning_gap: AI-DOS can differentiate on policy-bound orchestration and machine-enforced lifecycle governance.

competitors.name: Internal workflow tooling
strengths: Can be tailored to existing processes
competitors.positioning_gap: AI-DOS can replace brittle custom workflow logic with reusable governance primitives.

strategic_takeaways: The strongest wedge is governed orchestration rather than generic AI productivity.
Internal alternatives are a major obstacle and must be outcompeted on speed to value and operational discipline.
Enterprise positioning should emphasize policy control, approvals, and auditability.
